commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f82739c2177208a125fd9d56ea1b9e2a0ddeb82c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Slack `confirmedThreadTs` result field, asserts threaded outbound sends against Slack-confirmed thread evidence, and adds focused Slack send/outbound tests.

PR surface: Source +27, Tests +119. Total +146 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: at PR head, a threaded `sendMedia` or no-block media payload reaches the new shared assertion, while the upload-only send path returns no `confirmedThreadTs` when no follow-up chat message is posted. I did not run live Slack or local tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the PR still has a blocking media-compatibility defect and the external contributor proof remains mock-only.

target.title: fix(slack): fail unconfirmed threaded deliveries
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Slack threaded outbound sends could report success even when Slack did not confirm delivery into the requested thread. The send layer previously exposed `threadTs` by falling back to the requested value, so the outbound adapter could not distinguish a real Slack-confirmed thread from an echoed request.

## Why This Change Was Made

This change separates requested thread fallback from Slack-confirmed thread evidence. `sendMessageSlack` now exposes `confirmedThreadTs` only when Slack returns `message.thread_ts`, and the outbound adapter fails a requested threaded payload delivery unless that confirmed value matches the target thread. Receipts and participation tracking continue to use the best delivered thread value for existing Slack behavior.

## User Impact

When Slack omits or changes the destination thread, OpenClaw now surfaces a delivery failure instead of silently marking the reply as delivered to the original thread. Successful threaded Slack sends are unchanged, and unthreaded sends continue to use the existing path.

## Evidence

Head: `f82739c2177208a125fd9d56ea1b9e2a0ddeb82c`

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/slack/src/outbound-adapter.test.ts extensions/slack/src/send.blocks.test.ts`
- `pnpm oxfmt --check extensions/slack/src/send.ts extensions/slack/src/outbound-adapter.ts extensions/slack/src/outbound-adapter.test.ts extensions/slack/src/send.blocks.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
